title: catch runc v2 error
body:
when runc returns an error about not being v2 complient, catch the error
and logrus an actionable message for users.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Is this error landing upstream?

If not, I really think we ought to consider a Fedora 31 branch (or similar) - it might be a pain, but I don't like keeping nonstandard patches in master.

> Is this error landing upstream?
> 
> If not, I really think we ought to consider a Fedora 31 branch (or similar) - it might be a pain, but I don't like keeping nonstandard patches in master.

@mheon let me add a verbose note around this ... For something this small, lets keep it in master.  We need to get this merged with your migrate code and a new release cut pronto.
The migrate code definitely should not land in master. We don't want that going anywhere but F31.
Needs rebase to fix the crun job, then we can merge
